chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 925 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on Office objection at Flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.3940/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case. 14.06.2023 Ms. Shabbiran Lashari, Advocate for the petitioners Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General for the State Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with SIP Muhammad Aslam, Investigating Officer Crime No.35/2023 of Police Station, Bhiria City >>>>>>>>..<<<<<<< Mr. Noor Hassan Malik, Advocate, files Vakalatnama as well as statement along with certain documents on behalf of Respondent No.5, whereas, statements are also filed by Respondents No.2 and 4, which are taken on record. Petitioner No.1, namely, Mst. Jameelan is present. The Investigating Officer of Crime No.35 of 2023 of Police Station, Bhiria City, District Naushahro Feroze shall record the statement of Petitioner No.1, namely, Mst. Jameelan as well as the complainant. He shall submit the statement of petitioner No.1, namely, Mst. Jameelan along with his supplementary challan and evidence which the complainant has given to him regarding the first nikah of petitioner No.1 before learned Magistrate seized of the matter. The learned Magistrate shall apply his independent mind to take a decision based on law thereafter. As far as no arrest order which was given on 30.05.2023 is concerned, the same will remain into effect for a period of two weeks during which time the petitioners should approach the relevant Court to seek their relief. The petition stands disposed of along with listed application in the above terms.

As far as no arrest order which was given on 30.05.2023 is concerned, the same will remain into effect for a period of two weeks during which time the petitioners should approach the relevant Court to seek their relief. The petition stands disposed of along with listed application in the above terms. Judge Judge ARBROHI
